seoTitle: McKinney ISD Calendar 2026-2027 | Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: McKinney ISD Calendar 2026-2027 including first day, holidays, teacher workdays, Spring Break dates, printable PDF, and calendar downloads for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook.
calendarNotes: McKinney ISD starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 13, 2026 and ends instruction on May 27, 2027, with graduation day listed on May 28. Fall Break runs October 12-13, Thanksgiving runs November 23-27, Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, and Spring Break runs March 15-19. The calendar also lists staff development and teacher workdays, student holidays, bad weather days, and nine-week grading period markers.

calendarFaqs.q: When does McKinney ISD start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Thursday, August 13, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is McKinney ISD Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 15 through Friday, March 19, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for McKinney ISD in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The final instructional day is Thursday, May 27, 2027. Graduation day is listed for Friday, May 28.

customSections.label: McKinney ISD Calendar Overview 2026-2027
customSections.content:
McKinney ISD serves students and families in McKinney, Texas, and publishes districtwide academic calendar dates for school-year planning. The McKinney ISD 2026-2027 school calendar includes 172 instructional days, scheduled school holidays, staff development and teacher workdays, bad weather days, grading period markers, and major student breaks. Families can quickly find McKinney ISD days off, no-school dates, holidays, and student breaks for the 2026-2027 school year while planning transportation, childcare, appointments, activities, and travel.

This page organizes the official district calendar into key dates, downloadable calendar files, a printable PDF source, and a student-focused date list so parents do not have to search through the PDF for first day, last day, winter break, spring break, and no-school dates.

customSections.label: McKinney ISD Calendar Guide for Parents
customSections.content:
Parents can use the McKinney ISD 2026-2027 calendar as a planning guide for school attendance, childcare, family travel, appointments, athletics, and after-school activities. The most important dates to save are the first day of school, Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, teacher workdays, bad weather days, and the final instructional day.

Student holidays and teacher workdays are especially important because students are typically off while district staff may still report for planning or professional development. Emergency closures, weather decisions, campus events, registration deadlines, and schedule revisions are announced separately by McKinney ISD, so families should check the official district calendar and campus messages before making time-sensitive plans.

groups.label: How families can use this calendar
items: Save first day, last day, and major break dates before planning vacations or summer programs.
Track teacher workdays and staff development days because they may be no-school days for students.
Review bad weather days as tentative planning dates until McKinney ISD confirms whether make-up time is needed.
Use the official McKinney ISD calendar source for emergency closures, revisions, campus-specific events, and registration updates.

customSections.label: Month-by-Month McKinney ISD Calendar Summary
customSections.content: This month-by-month summary highlights the McKinney ISD school calendar dates families are most likely to check when planning school routines, holidays, days off, and student breaks.

rows: August 2026
Staff development and teacher workdays; first day of school on August 13
Use August to confirm transportation, supplies, before-school care, and daily routines.
September 2026
Labor Day and a staff development / teacher workday
Check no-school dates before scheduling appointments or childcare.
October 2026
Nine-week grading marker, Fall Break, and a staff development / teacher workday
Fall Break creates a short student holiday window for families.
November 2026
Thanksgiving Break runs November 23-27
This is a full holiday week commonly used for travel and childcare planning.
December 2026
Quarter marker and Winter Break begins December 21
Winter Break is the main mid-year holiday planning period.
January 2027
Winter Break ends January 1; students return after a January 4 staff workday
Families should plan for the return to school after the holiday break.
February 2027
Staff development and teacher workday dates
Teacher workdays can affect childcare even when they are not major holidays.
March 2027
Spring Break runs March 15-19; student holiday on March 26
March includes the main spring travel period and an additional no-school date.
April 2027
Bad weather days and staff development / teacher workday exchange day
Treat bad weather days as schedule placeholders unless McKinney ISD confirms they are used.
May 2027
Last instructional day on May 27; graduation day on May 28; Memorial Day
Use May dates for summer childcare, camps, travel, and graduation planning.

customSections.label: McKinney ISD Calendar Highlights 2026-2027
customSections.content: These McKinney ISD calendar highlights explain why the main school-year dates matter for family planning instead of repeating the full calendar table. Use this section to identify the dates most likely to affect childcare, travel, transportation, appointments, and school-year routines.

groups.label: Why these dates matter
items: The first day of school is the key date for setting transportation, pickup, lunch, supply, and before-school or after-school care routines.
Fall Break creates a short October no-school window that may not match every nearby North Texas district.
Thanksgiving Break is a full holiday week, so families often plan travel or childcare coverage well in advance.
Winter Break is the longest mid-year student break and can affect holiday travel, camps, and return-to-school routines.
Spring Break is the main spring travel and appointment-planning week for McKinney ISD families.
Teacher workdays and staff development days are important no-school dates for students even when they are not major holidays.
Bad weather days are schedule placeholders until McKinney ISD confirms whether make-up time is needed.
The final instructional day is the anchor date for summer childcare, camps, travel, and end-of-year planning.

customSections.label: McKinney ISD Calendar at a Glance
customSections.content: The school year begins in August, includes a short October Fall Break, pauses for Thanksgiving and Winter Break, continues through Spring Break in March, and ends before Memorial Day weekend. Families should also review staff development days and bad weather days because those dates can affect student attendance even when they are not major holiday breaks.

groups.label: Key planning windows
items: August 2026: school starts and regular attendance routines begin.
October 2026: Fall Break creates a short student holiday window.
December 2026-January 2027: Winter Break covers the main holiday closure period.
March 2027: Spring Break provides a full school-week break.
May 2027: the school year ends and summer planning begins.

The printable calendar reference is useful for keeping first day, last day, holidays, teacher workdays, bad weather days, and major school breaks available at home.

customSections.label: How We Verify McKinney ISD Calendar Dates
customSections.content: MySchoolDates checks McKinney ISD calendar dates against the official district calendar source, compares key dates such as first day, last day, Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Spring Break, staff development days, and bad weather days, then generates the downloadable calendar file from those reviewed records. The official McKinney ISD calendar remains the source of record for schedule changes, campus-specific events, closures, and district announcements.

customSections.label: Parent Questions About the McKinney ISD Calendar
customSections.content: These parent-focused answers clarify planned no-school days, teacher workdays, campus differences, and emergency updates. They are included as page content only and are not added to FAQ structured data.

rows: Does McKinney ISD have school on holidays?
No. Listed district holidays and student holidays are no-school days for students unless McKinney ISD announces a calendar change.
How many days off do McKinney ISD students have?

The calendar includes major breaks, student holidays, staff development days, teacher workdays, and bad weather days. Families should review the full date list for all McKinney ISD days off and no-school days.
Are teacher workdays student holidays?
Yes. McKinney ISD identifies staff development and teacher workdays as student holidays on the district calendar.
Is the McKinney ISD calendar the same for every campus?
This page summarizes the districtwide calendar. Campus events, testing schedules, athletics, and program-specific dates may vary by school.
When do McKinney ISD students return after Winter Break?
Students return after Winter Break on Tuesday, January 5, 2027, based on the published McKinney ISD calendar.
Does McKinney ISD have school tomorrow?

This page shows scheduled school calendar dates only. For tomorrow-specific attendance, weather closures, emergency cancellations, or same-day updates, families should check official McKinney ISD announcements.
Does McKinney ISD have school on Friday?
This calendar shows planned school dates only. Whether a specific Friday is a school day depends on the date, campus schedule, and any McKinney ISD announcements.
Is McKinney ISD closed today?
This page lists planned calendar dates, not real-time closures. Families should check official McKinney ISD announcements for weather closures, emergency cancellations, and same-day schedule changes.
When does McKinney ISD summer break start?
Summer break begins after the final instructional day on Thursday, May 27, 2027. Graduation day is listed for Friday, May 28, 2027.
How many instructional days are in the McKinney ISD 2026-2027 calendar?
The published McKinney ISD calendar lists 172 instructional days for the 2026-2027 school year.
How many holidays does McKinney ISD have?

McKinney ISD lists multiple holidays and student breaks, including Labor Day, Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Martin Luther King Jr. Day, Spring Break, student holidays, and Memorial Day. Families should review the full date list for every no-school day.
Does McKinney ISD have early release days?
This page focuses on major district calendar dates. Parents should check the official McKinney ISD calendar and campus announcements for early release schedules or dismissal-time changes.
When does McKinney ISD release next year's calendar?
McKinney ISD releases future school calendars after district review and approval. Families should check the official district calendar page for the newest published school year.
Where can parents check emergency school closures?
Weather closures, emergency cancellations, and same-day schedule changes are announced by McKinney ISD through official district and campus communication channels.
